3095190.name: Valheron
3095190.description:
Game Introduction

AtomicPunch Studio proudly presents its first game, Valhéron: The Demon’s Menace, a captivating action RPG created by Maël Boucault, a 20-year-old passionate developer.

After over 1000 hours of development, I’m proud to offer you this first version, with future updates planned to enrich the experience and add new features. Valhéron was born from a simple desire: to create a world that would entertain me and take you on an epic adventure.

Synopsis

In Valhéron, a world plagued by darkness, you play as Kwang, a fearsome swordsman, on a quest to stop Sevarog, a millennia-old demon released through a demonic rift. Alongside Gidéon, a sorcerer with mysterious powers, and Crunch, a robot with unknown origins, you must unite your strengths to save the threatened villages, uncover ancient secrets, and halt the demonic invasion.

An adventure filled with exploration, combat, and friendship.

Gameplay

  • A Trio of Heroes: Play as Kwang, Gidéon, or Crunch, each with unique abilities: Kwang for fast sword combat, Gidéon for long-range elemental magic, and Crunch, the tank who hits hard and endures attacks.

  • Dynamic Real-time Combat: Create strategic combos between the characters to eliminate enemies fluidly.

  • Exploration and Puzzles: Explore ancient ruins, solve puzzles, and use your heroes’ abilities to reach inaccessible areas. Crunch breaks obstacles, Gidéon manipulates the elements, and Kwang unlocks hidden passages.

  • Evolving Relationships: The bonds between the heroes strengthen through interactive dialogues, influencing their abilities and unlocking side quests.

Iconic Locations

  • Telmara: A village ravaged by darkness, the starting point of your adventure. Telmara is the first line of defense against the demonic invasion.

  • Arghona’s Iron Mines: Once a symbol of prosperity, these mines are now cursed by demonic forces. It’s both a challenge and a place that reveals ancient secrets.

  • Canyon of Tears: A sinister ravine, echoing with the tragic history of the kingdom. It connects cursed locations where demons and lost souls still haunt the area.

  • Temple of Ruin: The heart of the disaster, this temple houses the demonic rift threatening the entire world. Once a sanctuary for the gods, it has become a stronghold of darkness.
